visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are sitting on a large orange leather couch in a bright indoor living room with wooden blinds in the background. The woman on the left has long black hair, wears a white lace dress, and cradles a small white maltese dog. The woman on the right wears a white t-shirt and a grey-patterned fuzzy bucket hat; she is eating snacks from a large bowl. As she eats, a piece of food falls onto her white shirt, creating a visible brown stain. Brightly colored animated 'Ha Ha' text icons float around them. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of a large warehouse-style retail store. The two women are standing in an aisle surrounded by high-stacked shelves filled with boxes of 'Orange House' laundry products. They are both wearing hats—one a black and white patterned bucket hat, the other a similar grey fuzzy one. They hold a large orange and white box of laundry capsules, pointing at the packaging and smiling toward the camera. Bright overhead warehouse lighting illuminates the scene. (3) The camera provides a macro close-up of a single laundry pod, which is shaped like a small translucent orange with a green leaf-like section on top. The pod is filled with orange and green liquid. Following this, one of the women is seen in a laundry room environment, placing the orange-shaped pod into a front-loading washing machine filled with white clothes. The lighting is bright and clean. (4) Back in the living room setting, the woman who previously had a stained shirt is now holding up the same white t-shirt, which is now pristine and free of stains. She smiles widely and gestures toward the shirt with both hands. Both women stand together, each holding a laundry pod toward the camera in a final celebratory pose. The color tone is warm and vibrant throughout.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 哈哈. (2) [Subtitle]: 你的衣服哈哈哈. (3) [Subtitle]: 你衣服脫下來給我. (4) [Variety]: 你要幹嘛. (5) [Slogan]: 橘子工坊 還你一個乾淨溜溜. (6) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (7) [Slogan]: 天然的最好. (8) [Slogan]: 好市多獨家. (9) [Slogan]: 橘子工坊 洗衣膠囊. (10) [Slogan]: 96入589元. (11) [Subtitle]: 其他品牌都要8、9塊. (12) [Subtitle]: 以前只能網購. (13) [Slogan]: 小橘子膠囊 看了就可愛. (14) [Subtitle]: 天然制菌除臭酵素洗衣膠囊. (15) [Slogan]: 小橘子的模樣. (16) [Slogan]: 99.9%制菌. (17) [Subtitle]: 穿在身上更加安心. (18) [Slogan]: 無香精 無螢光劑. (19) [Logo]: True Clean. (20) [Subtitle]: 洗好了! 味道超級舒服. (21) [Subtitle]: 推薦給值得穿上最好的你!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with long black hair often wearing a white dress or beige top, the other often wearing a white t-shirt and various bucket hats.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic living room with an orange couch and wooden blinds; a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and bulk products; a laundry area with a modern washing machine.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-arousal female laughter and enthusiastic conversational speech in Traditional Chinese. A bright, upbeat acoustic guitar-driven BGM at approximately 124 BPM provides a cheerful background. A comedic 'boing' or 'sproing' SFX punctuates the moment food hits the shirt. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX signals a transition. The vocal delivery shifts to an informative, high-energy narrative style, typical of a promotional vlog. The BGM continues with a consistent, driving percussive beat. (3) A 'ding' or bell-like SFX occurs when the product is showcased. The acoustics exhibit high spectral brightness, emphasizing clarity in the speech and the 'sparkling' sound effects used for product highlights. (4) Mechanical 'click' and 'thud' sounds are heard during the washing machine demonstration, quickly followed by more upbeat narration and a final percussive musical flourish as the speakers deliver a closing call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Orange House laundry capsules by demonstrating their cleaning efficacy on a common food stain, highlighting their availability and value at Costco, and emphasizing their safety/natural ingredients.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is centered around the usage, benefits, and price of a specific branded product (Orange House laundry pods) sold at a specific retailer (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses high-energy editing and bright visuals to appeal to a lifestyle-oriented audience. The contrast between the 'messy' home opening and the 'clean' warehouse/laundry resolution creates a satisfying narrative arc for a short-form ad.
